description_long: This computer monitor features a wide, rectangular display with a thick, angular bezel that is predominantly black, accented by green and red highlights on the front. The bezel has a geometric, almost futuristic design, with sharp corners and colored indicator areas on the top right and bottom left. The rear of the monitor includes two prominent, curved support arms that appear to function as a stand, providing stability and a unique visual profile. The back also features two pouch-like structures, possibly for cable management or accessory storage. No visible ports or branding are present on the exterior. The overall design suggests a rugged, utilitarian monitor suitable for urban or industrial environments.
description: A black, angular computer monitor with colored accents and a distinctive dual-curved rear stand, featuring a thick bezel and pouch-like structures on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide black screen, thick bezel, and colored indicator accents on the top right and bottom left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the screen and the prominent, curved dual-arm stand extending from the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two curved support arms and two pouch-like structures, with no visible ports or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curvature and depth of the rear stand, as well as the thinness of the monitor body.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, angular, and black with sharp corners and colored accent areas on the top right and bottom left, giving it a rugged, high-contrast appearance.
attribute_stand_type: Dual curved arm stand extending from the rear, made of black plastic or metal, providing stability and a distinctive look; no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: Small colored buttons are located on the top right corner of the front bezel, grouped together for easy access.
